THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE CONDUCTED A STORM SURVEY AND HAS CONFIRMED A TORNADO TOUCHDOWN WITH AN EF1 RATING. WIND SPEEDS ARE ESTIMATED TO BE 85 TO 95 MPH. THE WIDTH IS ESTIMATED TO BE 0.3 MILE WITH PATH LENGTH OF APPROXIMATELY 4.12 MILES. 300 TO 500 TREES WERE DOWN ALONG THE TORNADO PATH.

THE WIDTH IS ESTIMATED TO BE ONE THIRD MILE AND THE LENGTH OF THE PATH APPROXIMATELY TWO MILES LONG. THREE TO FIVE HUNDRED TREES WERE DOWN ALONG THE TORNADO PATH.
